quoteFirst: We were now working to wind’ard to the entrance of the Pearl Islands. At 1.35 p.m. we started the motor, and at
quoteLast: brought up for the night in 13 fms. between Monge and Puercos islets, which lie off the east coast of the large Isla del Rey. We have done 60 miles to-day.

quoteFirst: “How can I tell you? it was perfection, _vi bisognava vederla_,” was the enthusiastic reply. “Stay,” he continued, glancing at the clock, which now only wanted
quoteLast: ; “I have an idea; there is yet time, but you must never relate that you have beheld it. quoteFirst: At half past four our course was south-east and by south; we passed two islands to the south-east of us, at two miles, and a smaller, west south-west a quarter of a mile distant. From this to the Main will be about five miles, or something more. At
quoteLast: , came up to an island which reached to Konfodah. We saw to the west, and west south-west of us, different small islands, not more than half a mile distant.
